name: Garlic Straws
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 425°F. Roll out the puff pastry on a floured board into a rectangle, as thinly as possible.
Stir the garlic juice into most of the milk and brush half of it onto the pastry.
Mix the paprika, Parmesan, salt, and cayenne. Sprinkle over one half of the pastry.
Fold the pastry and roll out as thinly as possible.
Repeat with the remaining garlic-milk mixture and Parmesan, rolling to a rectangle no more than 1/4 inch thick.
Brush with milk and cut into strips about 1/2 inch wide and 6 inches long.
Arrange the straws at least an inch apart on greased baking sheets. Bake for 7 to 10 minutes or until well-risen and golden brown. Serve warm, piled onto each other in a log cabin style.
